sourceContext.lead: Translated and adapted from Kamigame's Marcille guide.
sourceContext.citationText: Source page: Marcille Guide - Star Savior | Kamigame.

hero.title: Marcille
hero.subhead: Sun | Assassin | Single-target Debuff DPS | Impact
hero.summary: Burn and Recovery Down are both attached to her damage buttons, so she benefits from a mixed crit-plus-hit stat line. From there, branch into the Damage route and the Tempo route as your gear options widen.

combatIdentity.title: Combat Identity
combatIdentity.summary: Marcille feels best once Speed, Crit Rate, and Crit DMG are online, giving the first rotation a much steadier payoff.
bullets: Main stats stay on Speed necklace and ATK% ring.
Substat focus: Speed, Crit Rate, Crit DMG, and ATK%.

skillRotation.title: Skill Rotation
skillRotation.summary: Skill investment is cleanest as Ultimate >= Special >= Basic, with the first cooldown setting the pace for the full rotation.

steps.title: Open with Ultimate
steps.detail: Lead with the highest-invested cooldown so the opener starts on the strongest possible breakpoint.

steps.title: Cash in on Special
steps.detail: Special is usually the next meaningful breakpoint once the opener lands and should carry the mid-cycle payoff.

steps.title: Fill with Basic
steps.detail: Use Basic between cooldowns while you keep Speed and Crit Rate stable on gear.

steps.title: Upgrade toward the final target
steps.detail: Budget target is 3 / 3 / 3, with 7 / 8 / 8 as the long-term skill finish.

buildPlanner.title: Build Planner
buildPlanner.summary: Start on the Core line with Insight (4pc) + Hit (2pc) and Speed necklace and ATK% ring. Move into the Damage route and the Tempo route once the baseline is stable.

sets.label: Core
sets.note: Core keeps SPD on the necklace and ATK% on the ring.

sets.label: Damage
sets.note: Damage keeps SPD on the necklace and ATK% on the ring.

sets.label: Tempo
sets.note: Tempo keeps SPD on the necklace and ATK% on the ring.

priorities: Substats: SPD, Crit Rate, Crit DMG, ATK%, Effect Hit%

targetStats.summary: Lock Speed necklace and ATK% ring, then stack  through substats.

upgradePath.title: Priority
items: Breakthrough priority: raise copies after the main skill breakpoints are online.
Substat focus: Speed, Crit Rate, Crit DMG, and ATK%

items.label: Passive
items.title: Hammer and Anvil
items.summary: Marcille's passive matters more once the core stat line is online and the rotation is already stable.

items.label: Basic
items.title: Nut Twist
items.summary: Use the basic to bridge cooldowns; it should stay behind the two higher-impact skills in upgrade priority.

items.label: Special
items.title: Nail Drive
items.summary: Special is the next major breakpoint after the opener and usually carries the mid-cycle payoff.

items.label: Ultimate
items.title: Screw Breaker
items.summary: Ultimate anchors the opener and stays at the top of the investment order for this build.
